summary: Accepted the M7 UI and localization regression matrix after QA R2 ACCEPT and lead integration gates. The accepted Playwright matrix isolates every locale/viewport scenario in a fresh browser context and page, covers English, zh-CN, system-language fallback, language switching, localStorage persistence, visible raw-key hygiene, player-mode debug/prototype text absence, console/pageerror checks, and representative Beta viewports. The task remains observable-only through DOM/read-model behavior and does not inspect authoritative WorldState or Pixi internals.

tests_run.result: Clean before lead accept handoff write.
Task registry listed; M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 was REVIEW before lead accept.
No READY task output while this task is active.

tests_run.result: Passed; Vite build completed with existing >500k chunk warnings.
Passed; Storybook build completed with existing plugin timing and chunk warnings.
Passed; focused Chromium Playwright test 1/1 passed.
Passed; Electron security preferences, preload bridge, renderer navigation restriction, and IPC allowlist verified.
Passed; format, lint, typecheck, and architecture checks passed.

decisions: Accept QA R2 status=ACCEPT and advance task to ACCEPTED pending PR CI and main integration.
R2 fixed the prior Playwright addInitScript isolation defect by creating a fresh browser context and page per locale/viewport scenario.
Firefox, Edge, Windows DPI, and full platform/resolution localization permutations remain deferred to M7-PLATFORM-RESOLUTION-LOCALIZATION-MATRIX-001.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; no release, signing, update, telemetry, account, cloud-save, commercial workflow, server, multiplayer, or authority-boundary change is introduced.
risks: Chromium-only regression coverage is accepted for this task because cross-browser/platform/DPI permutations are explicitly assigned to the platform/resolution localization matrix task.
Existing build chunk-size and Storybook plugin timing warnings remain non-blocking and unchanged by this task.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then close M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 after origin/main contains the accepted changes.
